why: Protocol 775 Login clientbound minecraft:login_disconnect must dispatch through Stevenarella packet_by_id using the official framed packet id and body bytes generated by the oracle answer. This is packet framing/dispatch/decode evidence for one official empty literal Component reason fixture only, not UI disconnect handling, screen flow, authentication failure handling, Configuration entry, Play readiness, or client-load completion.
what: The exact Rust oracle test panics while exercising packet::packet_by_id(775, State::Login, Direction::Clientbound, packet id 0, official login_disconnect body bytes) because the current Protocol 775 Login clientbound table has no mapping for packet id 0x00. The generated official body is 022222 for Component.literal(""); the Rust fix may need packet id mapping plus any bounded body decoder needed for this official component fixture.
stop_condition: The exact Rust oracle test passes, then bash oracle/scripts/run_jar_backed_oracle_tests.sh passes without editing oracle expected-answer artifacts.
